name: apple-ui-craft
description: Principal-engineer-grade Apple UI craft for iOS 26. Seven Fable 5 agents that design, review, optimize, and craft SwiftUI so it feels like Apple built it -- Liquid Glass, spring animation, intentional haptics, accessibility from birth, SwiftUI performance, and deep platform + cross-platform integration (widgets, Live Activities, App Intents, Apple Intelligence, WebView, watchOS/tvOS/visionOS/CarPlay). Six skills: design-ios (greenfield screen/flow creation), review-ios-ui (HIG + visual + interaction audit), optimize-ios-ui (animation + haptics + performance tuning), craft-ios-ui (full 5-specialist team sweep), audit-accessibility (deep a11y audit), integrate-platform (system-integration audit). Backed by a self-contained reference library across 12 domains (see ARCHITECTURE.md) distilled from an 88-document iOS vault (102,900+ lines), a Context7-verified version-floor registry, GoodMem learnings, and serena navigation. Under ultracode the session model conducts and Sonnet-5-xhigh executor teams run the scoped grunt stages. Read-only review by default; findings apply only on explicit user approval.
